bottom_line:
BULLISH. Starbucks Corporation (SBUX) printed $9.53B in revenue in FY2026 Q1 (+1.4% YoY). Management credibility is strong (MCS 1.00, 1B/0H/0M record), supporting take-up of the forward guide. At 26.0x forward P/E, the stock carries a 16% premium to peers (22.5x median) — the multiple needs continued execution to defend.

Technical regime is mixed: trend is intact above the 200-DMA ($90.63) but RSI 71 signals near-term overbought conditions — consider entry timing. Sell-side consensus PT of $110 implies +3.4% upside. 30-day implied move is ±8.0%; 90-day is ±16.9%.
